TestCase z10Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_v = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_v, t1.v, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.v = follow_case_v;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive programming: ensure there is at least one element to shift
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Right circular shift: move last element to front
    double last = follow_case.v[follow_case.n - 1];
    for (int i = follow_case.n - 1; i > 0; --i) {
        follow_case.v[i] = follow_case.v[i - 1];
    }
    follow_case.v[0] = last;

    return follow_case;
}
